reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) It has Wi-Fi, but it doesn't work well. The gasoline is good. There's a restaurant across the highway with good, inexpensive food. The restrooms are clean.

(Original)
Tem wi-fi, não funciona bem. Gasolina boa. Tem um restaurante do outro lado da rodovia, tem comida boa e barata. Banheiros limpos.

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio, cuentan con servicios sanitarios y hay hasta un hotel donde puedes pasar la noche y se te hace tarde en la ruta; lo único malo es que solo recibe efectivo pesos argentinos y tarjeta de la franquicia Visa

(Translated by Google)
Good service, they have restrooms and even a hotel where you can spend the night if you're late on the road; the only downside is that they only accept Argentine pesos and Visa cards.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZcXJmbDhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
La verdad que para ser un punto tan distante cuenta con una muy buena instalación, baños limpios y el cafe bien surtido. Buena atención ideal para una parada previa a seguir viaje.

(Translated by Google)
For being so far away, it has very good facilities, clean restrooms, and a well-stocked café. Good service, ideal for a stop before continuing your journey.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvNktyZFp3EAE

reviews.comment:
Un desayuno impecable, las medialunas muuuy ricas! El alojamiento, para tener en cuenta, s un precio accesible, limpio y muy cómodo.

(Translated by Google)
An impeccable breakfast, the croissants were delicious! The accommodation is worth considering; it's affordable, clean, and very comfortable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvLVl5LTNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
La persona que atiende es muy amable. Esa persona hace todo corre para todos lados. Atiende corriendo pars poder atender a todos. Es una vergüenza que el dueño de la estación no contrate mas gente o el mismo se ponga a laburar y no explotar como explota al pobre empleado. No tienen super. Y otra cosa te cobran lo que quieren. A la ida nafta infinia a 45 a los 9 dias 47.45. Cuando la nafta no tenia incrementos desde ypf.

(Translated by Google)
The person who works there is very friendly. They do everything, running around everywhere. They rush to serve everyone. It's a disgrace that the station owner doesn't hire more people or even work himself instead of exploiting the poor employee like he does. They don't have a supermarket. And another thing, they charge whatever they want. On the way there, Infinia gasoline was 45, and nine days later it was 47.45. This was back when gasoline prices hadn't increased since YPF.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvMkl6Y1hREAE
